description: George Lucas's space opera spanning galaxies, eras, and generations. The original trilogy defined blockbuster filmmaking; the expanded universe encompasses over 100 games, a dozen TV series, and more than 300 novels across six decades.

media.title: Star Wars: Episode IV – A New Hope
media.description: Farm boy Luke Skywalker joins the Rebel Alliance against the Galactic Empire and Darth Vader. The one that started everything.
media.notes: Watch theatrical cut if possible; 1997 Special Edition adds controversial CGI changes.

media.title: Star Wars: Episode V – The Empire Strikes Back
media.description: The Empire hunts the Rebels. Luke trains with Yoda on Dagobah. Considered the best film in the saga.

media.title: Star Wars: Episode VI – Return of the Jedi
media.description: The Rebel Alliance launches a final assault on the second Death Star while Luke confronts Vader and the Emperor.

media.title: Star Wars: Episode I – The Phantom Menace
media.description: Young Anakin Skywalker is discovered by Qui-Gon Jinn amid a Trade Federation blockade of Naboo.

media.title: Star Wars: Episode II – Attack of the Clones
media.description: Anakin and Padmé's forbidden romance develops as the Clone Wars begin.

media.title: Star Wars: Episode III – Revenge of the Sith
media.description: Anakin Skywalker falls to the dark side and becomes Darth Vader. The Republic becomes the Empire.

media.title: Star Wars: Episode VII – The Force Awakens
media.description: Thirty years after Return of the Jedi — Rey, Finn, and Poe emerge as new heroes against the First Order.

media.title: Rogue One: A Star Wars Story
media.description: A team of Rebels steals the Death Star plans in the days immediately before A New Hope.
media.notes: Best of the anthology films. Sets up ANH directly.

media.title: Star Wars: Episode VIII – The Last Jedi
media.description: Rey seeks Luke's training while the Resistance flees the First Order. Subverts franchise expectations.

media.title: Solo: A Star Wars Story
media.description: Han Solo's origin story — the Kessel Run, meeting Chewie, and early days as a smuggler.
media.notes: Box office disappointment but solid adventure film.

media.title: Star Wars: Episode IX – The Rise of Skywalker
media.description: The Skywalker saga concludes as the Resistance faces a resurrected Palpatine and his Final Order fleet.

media.title: The Star Wars Holiday Special
media.description: Chewbacca's family celebrates Life Day. Infamously bad CBS TV special that George Lucas has tried to erase from history.
media.notes: Non-canon. Never officially released. Must be sourced from fan preservation copies.

media.title: Caravan of Courage: An Ewok Adventure
media.description: Two children crash-land on Endor and are helped by Ewoks to find their parents. ABC TV movie.

media.title: Ewoks: The Battle for Endor
media.description: Sequel TV movie with Wicket and a human girl facing a new villain on Endor.

media.title: The Star Wars Droids: The Pirates and the Prince
media.description: Compilation film edited from the Droids animated series.

media.title: Star Wars: The Clone Wars (film)
media.description: Theatrical pilot for the CGI animated TV series. Anakin gains an apprentice, Ahsoka Tano.
media.notes: Canon. Watch before or with Season 1 of the show.

media.title: The Mandalorian
media.description: A lone Mandalorian bounty hunter protects a mysterious Force-sensitive child (Grogu) across the Outer Rim.
media.notes: Canon. Entry point for Disney+ era. Seasons 1–2 are excellent.

media.title: The Book of Boba Fett
media.description: Boba Fett attempts to establish himself as crime lord of Tatooine after escaping the Sarlacc.
media.notes: Canon. Episodes 5–6 are essentially Mandalorian Season 2.5.

media.title: Obi-Wan Kenobi
media.description: Set 10 years after Revenge of the Sith — Obi-Wan must confront Vader and rescue a young Leia.

media.title: Andor
media.description: Cassian Andor's radicalization into the Rebellion. Grounded, adult political thriller unlike anything else in the franchise.
media.notes: Canon. Prequel to Rogue One. Strongest writing of any Star Wars live-action.

media.title: Ahsoka
media.description: Ahsoka Tano investigates the return of Grand Admiral Thrawn and searches for Ezra Bridger.
media.notes: Canon. Watch Rebels first for full context.

media.title: Skeleton Crew
media.description: Four kids from a hidden planet get lost in the galaxy and encounter Jod Na Nawood (Jude Law).

media.title: Star Wars: The Acolyte
media.description: Set 100 years before the Prequels — a mysterious Sith master emerges in the High Republic era.

media.title: Star Wars: The Clone Wars (TV)
media.description: Fills in the Clone Wars era between Episodes II and III. Introduces Ahsoka Tano, fleshes out Anakin's fall.
media.notes: Canon. Essential. Watch in Chronological order, not release order — many arcs are out of sequence.

media.title: Star Wars Rebels
media.description: A young Jedi-in-hiding joins a ragtag rebel cell years before the Battle of Yavin. Introduces Ezra Bridger and Grand Admiral Thrawn.
media.notes: Canon. Seasons 3–4 are exceptional. Necessary before Ahsoka.

media.title: Star Wars Resistance
media.description: Anime-influenced animation following a Resistance spy during the events of the Sequel Trilogy.

media.title: The Bad Batch
media.description: Clone Force 99, a squad of genetically enhanced clones, navigate the newly formed Empire.
media.notes: Canon. Direct follow-on from Clone Wars.

media.title: Tales of the Jedi
media.description: Anthology shorts following Ahsoka Tano and Count Dooku at key moments in their lives.

media.title: Tales of the Empire
media.description: Anthology shorts following Morgan Elsbeth and Barriss Offee under the Galactic Empire.

media.title: Star Wars: The Droids Adventure Hour (Droids)
media.description: R2-D2 and C-3PO's adventures before A New Hope. Saturday morning cartoon.

media.title: Star Wars: Ewoks
media.description: Animated adventures of Wicket and the Ewoks of Endor, set before Return of the Jedi.

media.title: Star Wars: Clone Wars (2003 Micro-series)
media.description: Genndy Tartakovsky's hand-drawn micro-series bridging Episodes II and III. Visceral, kinetic action.
media.notes: Legends since 2014 (superseded by The Clone Wars CGI series). Still exceptional.

media.title: Star Wars: Visions (Season 1)
media.description: Anthology of non-canon short films by Japanese animation studios reimagining Star Wars.
media.notes: Non-canon. Pure artistic showcase — excellent animation.

media.title: Star Wars: Visions (Season 2)
media.description: Second Visions anthology expanding to international animation studios beyond Japan.

media.title: Young Jedi Adventures
media.description: Preschool-targeted animated series set in the High Republic era following Jedi younglings.

media.title: Star Wars (Atari 2600)
media.description: Early licensed adaptation of the film for Atari 2600.

media.title: Star Wars: The Arcade Game
media.description: First-person vector graphics arcade game recreating the Death Star trench run.
media.notes: Core: mess for Atari ports. Iconic cabinet.

media.title: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (Atari)
media.description: Defend Echo Base from AT-ATs in this Atari 2600 adaptation.

media.title: Super Star Wars
media.description: Action-platformer retelling of A New Hope with brutal SNES difficulty. Mode 7 vehicle sections.
media.notes: Core: snes9x. First of an excellent SNES trilogy.

media.title: Super Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back
media.description: SNES retelling of Empire. Adds Hoth speeders, Dagobah, and Cloud City.

media.title: Super Star Wars: Return of the Jedi
media.description: SNES trilogy concludes on Endor and the second Death Star.

media.title: Star Wars: TIE Fighter
media.description: Fly for the Empire. Considered one of the greatest space combat simulators ever made.
media.notes: PC / Sunshine streaming. Legends. GOG version available.

media.title: Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter
media.description: Multiplayer-focused follow-up to X-Wing and TIE Fighter with cooperative and competitive modes.

media.title: Star Wars: Jedi Knight – Dark Forces II
media.description: Kyle Katarn gains Force powers. First game to feature proper lightsaber combat.

media.title: Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire
media.description: Set between Empire and Jedi. Dash Rendar fights Xizor. N64 launch-era prestige title.

media.title: Star Wars: Rogue Squadron
media.description: Arcade-style starfighter missions as Luke Skywalker. 16 missions, full N64 Expansion Pak support.

media.title: Star Wars: Episode I – The Phantom Menace (PS1)
media.description: Third-person action game retelling of the film.

media.title: Star Wars: Episode I – Racer
media.description: Podracer game based on the Boonta Eve Classic. Excellent racing at ridiculous speeds.
media.notes: Core: mupen64plus_next for N64. Modern remaster available on Switch/PS4. Legends.

media.title: Star Wars: Jedi Knight II – Jedi Outcast
media.description: Kyle Katarn returns. Arguably the best lightsaber combat in any Star Wars game.

media.title: Star Wars: Rogue Squadron II – Rogue Leader
media.description: GameCube launch title. Jaw-dropping recreations of the Death Star trench run, Hoth, and Endor.

media.title: Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III – Rebel Strike
media.description: Adds ground missions to the Rogue Squadron formula. Divisive but includes full co-op.

media.title: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic
media.description: 4000 years before the films, a Republic soldier unravels a galaxy-altering secret. Contains one of gaming's greatest plot twists.
media.notes: PC / Sunshine. iOS/Android mobile ports available. Legends.

media.title: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II – The Sith Lords
media.description: The Exile flees Jedi hunters across a galaxy ravaged by war. Darker, more philosophical than KOTOR 1. Use the Restored Content Mod.
media.notes: PC / Sunshine. Use TSLRCM mod. iOS/Android mobile ports available. Legends.

media.title: Star Wars: Battlefront (2004)
media.description: Third-person squad shooter across iconic Star Wars battlefields. Up to 64-player multiplayer.

media.title: Star Wars: Battlefront II (2005)
media.description: Adds space battles, hero characters, and a full story mode following the 501st Legion.
media.notes: Core: pcsx2. PC version still has active online community (GameSpy replacement). Legends.

media.title: LEGO Star Wars: The Video Game
media.description: The Prequel Trilogy in LEGO form. Launched the entire LEGO games genre.
media.notes: Core: pcsx2 for PS2, mgba for GBA. Non-canon humor.

media.title: LEGO Star Wars II: The Original Trilogy
media.description: LEGO OT — often considered the best of the LEGO Star Wars games.
media.notes: Core: pcsx2 for PS2, melonds for DS, mgba for GBA. Non-canon.

media.title: LEGO Star Wars: The Complete Saga
media.description: Combines LEGO SW 1 and 2 with updated graphics and bonus characters.
media.notes: Core: dolphin for Wii, melonds for DS. iOS/Android available. Non-canon.

media.title: LEGO Star Wars III: The Clone Wars
media.description: Based on Clone Wars TV series. Adds large-scale ground battles and space missions.
media.notes: Core: dolphin for Wii, citra for 3DS. Non-canon.

media.title: LEGO Star Wars: The Force Awakens
media.description: TFA in LEGO with extra story content bridging ROTJ to TFA.

media.title: LEGO Star Wars: The Skywalker Saga
media.description: All nine Skywalker Saga films in one massive LEGO game. Redesigned from scratch with over 300 characters.

media.title: Star Wars: Republic Commando
media.description: Tactical squad FPS following Delta Squad of elite Clone commandos during the Clone Wars.
media.notes: PC / Sunshine. Legends. Modern re-release on Switch/PS4.

media.title: Star Wars: The Force Unleashed
media.description: Vader's secret apprentice Starkiller wields explosive Force powers between Episodes III and IV.
media.notes: Core: dolphin for Wii, pcsx2 for PS2, melonds for DS. iOS/Android mobile available. Legends.

media.title: Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II
media.description: Shorter, divisive sequel. Refined combat but weak story.
media.notes: Core: dolphin for Wii, melonds for DS. iOS/Android available. Legends.

media.title: Star Wars: The Old Republic
media.description: MMO set in the KOTOR era with eight fully-voiced class storylines each playing like a single-player RPG.
media.notes: PC / Sunshine. Free-to-play base game. Legends adjacent — not quite Legends, not quite canon.

media.title: Star Wars: Angry Birds Star Wars
media.description: Angry Birds themed around the Original Trilogy. Surprisingly decent physics puzzler.

media.title: Star Wars: Angry Birds Star Wars II
media.description: Prequel Trilogy Angry Birds with Telepods physical toy compatibility.

media.title: Star Wars: Battlefront (2015)
media.description: EA's reboot of Battlefront — visually stunning multiplayer focused on OT era. Limited content at launch.

media.title: Star Wars Battlefront II (2017)
media.description: Expanded multiplayer battlefront with campaign following Iden Versio post-ROTJ. Story is canon.
media.notes: PC / Sunshine. Single-player story is canon. Infamously launched with predatory loot boxes.

media.title: Star Wars Jedi: Fallen Order
media.description: Jedi Padawan Cal Kestis survives Order 66 and rebuilds the Jedi Order. Soulslike-influenced with Metroidvania progression.
media.notes: PC / Sunshine. Canon. One of the best modern SW games.

media.title: Star Wars Jedi: Survivor
media.description: Sequel to Fallen Order — Cal navigates the Empire's tightening grip five years later.
media.notes: PC / Sunshine. Canon. Play Fallen Order first.

media.title: Star Wars: Squadrons
media.description: Cockpit-view starfighter combat — story told from both Imperial and New Republic sides. Full VR support.

media.title: Star Wars: Hunters
media.description: Free-to-play arena combat game set after Return of the Jedi. Mobile and Switch.

media.title: Star Wars: Galaxy of Heroes
media.description: Collectible RPG gacha featuring characters from across the entire Star Wars universe.

media.title: Star Wars: Force Arena
media.description: MOBA-style real-time strategy mobile game. Shut down in 2019.

media.title: Star Wars: Commander
media.description: Base-building strategy game. Choose Rebels or Empire. Bridged canon and Legends.

media.title: Star Wars: Uprising
media.description: Action RPG set immediately after Return of the Jedi. Canon story content bridging to TFA.
media.notes: Mobile. Defunct — servers closed 2016. Was canon.

media.title: Star Wars: Tiny Death Star
media.description: Pixel art tower management game in the style of Tiny Tower, themed around the Death Star.
media.notes: Mobile. Defunct — removed from app stores 2014.

media.title: Star Wars: Card Trader
media.description: Digital trading card collectible app spanning the entire franchise.

media.title: Star Wars Pinball
media.description: Virtual pinball tables themed around Star Wars films and series.
media.notes: Mobile and PC. Part of Zen Pinball / Pinball FX.

media.title: Star Wars: Droid Repair Bay
media.description: VR experience for Oculus Rift — repair BB-8 in a Resistance hangar.

media.title: Star Wars: Tales from the Galaxy's Edge
media.description: VR action-adventure set on Batuu, connected to the Galaxy's Edge theme park experience.

media.title: Star Wars: Outlaws
media.description: First open-world Star Wars game — Kay Vess navigates the criminal underworld between ESB and ROTJ.

media.title: Star Wars: Dark Forces
media.description: First-person shooter that predates Doom's formula — Kyle Katarn steals the Death Star plans. Legends.
media.notes: PC. 2024 remaster available on modern platforms. Legends.

media.title: Star Wars Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy
media.description: Create your own Jedi and train under Kyle Katarn. Last of the Jedi Knight series.

media.title: Star Wars: Starfighter
media.description: Starfighter combat game set during the events of The Phantom Menace.

media.title: Star Wars: Bounty Hunter
media.description: Jango Fett hunts a Dark Jedi in a story bridging the gap to Episode II.
media.notes: Core: pcsx2 for PS2, dolphin for GC. Legends.

media.title: Star Wars: Obi-Wan
media.description: Xbox exclusive retelling of The Phantom Menace from Obi-Wan's perspective.

media.title: Star Wars: Masters of Teräs Käsi
media.description: Star Wars fighting game with characters including Luke, Vader, and Boba Fett. Notoriously poor.

media.title: Star Wars: Demolition
media.description: Vehicular combat arena game (Twisted Metal-style) set in the SW universe.

media.title: Star Wars: Jedi Power Battles
media.description: Beat-'em-up following Jedi through the events of The Phantom Menace. Co-op supported.
media.notes: Core: pcsx_rearmed for PS1, mgba for GBA. Legends.

media.title: Star Wars: Episode I – Battle for Naboo
media.description: Starfighter combat game following Naboo Royal Guard captain Gavyn Sykes.

media.title: Star Wars: The Clone Wars (GameCube/PS2)
media.description: Vehicle combat game set during the early Clone Wars. Includes Assault on Geonosis.
media.notes: Core: pcsx2 for PS2, dolphin for GC. Legends.

media.title: Star Wars: The Clone Wars – Republic Heroes
media.description: Co-op action game bridging Clone Wars Season 1 and 2. Aimed at younger audiences.
media.notes: Core: dolphin for Wii. Legends adjacent — pre-canon consolidation.

media.title: Star Wars: The Clone Wars – Lightsaber Duels
media.description: Wii motion-control lightsaber fighting game based on the CGI series.

media.title: Star Wars: Kinect
media.description: Kinect motion-control Star Wars game. Famous for its Galactic Dance Off mode.

media.title: Star Wars 1313
media.description: CANCELLED — Third-person action game set in Coruscant's criminal underworld, starring young Boba Fett. Cancelled when Disney acquired Lucasfilm in 2012.
media.notes: Never released. Gameplay footage exists. Considered one of the greatest lost games.

media.title: Star Wars: First Assault
media.description: CANCELLED — Multiplayer FPS planned as a precursor to a new Battlefront. Cancelled with LucasArts closure in 2013.

media.title: Rogue Squadron (2021 film)
media.description: CANCELLED — Patty Jenkins (Wonder Woman) directorial project based on Rebel starfighter pilots. Departed from development in 2022.

media.title: Star Wars: Attack Squadrons
media.description: CANCELLED — Free-to-play browser-based starfighter combat announced 2013, cancelled 2014 before launch.
